summary: I can’t reliably search the live web from this chat, so I’m unable to verify today’s posts, videos, tweets, and commentary from the named analysts in real time. The only current signals I can safely extract from the provided search snippets point to a risk-off tone: USD strength, weaker Bitcoin/altcoins, and pressure on gold/silver from yields and the dollar, with crude still supported by supply concerns.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: He repeatedly frames Bitcoin as the market trigger, looking for a bounce/rebound, a coiling breakout before CPI, and a lead move back higher after support tests and dumps.
signals.chart_pattern: bounce zone, rejection-retest, coiling before CPI

signals.name: Solana
signals.reason: He explicitly says he is very bullish on SOL and asks whether SOL is ready to rip, implying an upside continuation setup.

signals.name: Sui
signals.reason: He groups SUI with SOL as a token that looks ready to move higher, suggesting a constructive breakout setup.
